summary:
INTRODUCTION TO THE PROPHETIC VISION: Brandon introduces a vision received by a follower in January 2020, which his wife reads aloud. Brandon explains that this prophecy serves as confirmation that the end times are approaching rapidly, bringing a forthcoming Rapture and a spiritual outpouring. Brandon notes the current acceleration of dreams, visions, and visitations occurring in the spiritual realm as evidence of these impending biblical events.

THE HEAVENLY SYMPHONY AND THE THRONE OF GOD: Brandon shares the details of the vision where the visionary is transported to the Heavenly Symphony before the Crystal Sea. The scene features millions of saints and angels worshipping, singing, playing instruments, and dancing before the blinding light of the Throne of God. The visionary describes bowing before the Ancient of Days and witnessing a giant, perfect circular rainbow surrounding the throne, mirrored by the Crystal Sea below. The space beneath the throne is paved with multicolored gemstones described as stones of fire, while dancers move in perfect choreography across a frozen section of the sea.

THE ANGELIC MESSAGE AND THE FINAL HARVEST: Brandon conveys the angel's instruction to record the heavenly song for the earthly bride, declaring that the fullness of the harvest has arrived. The message proclaims that the bride will rise in splendor to rule and reign on Earth, no longer trampled by the wicked. Concurrently, the vision warns of impending doom and judgment for the wicked, noting that Satan has been cast down for a brief period. The angelic song declares that the time of Jacob's trouble is imminent, urging individuals to run to the Mercy Seat, repent, and seek refuge from the coming wrath while a window of grace remains open.

COMING WAR AND THE RETURN OF CHRIST: Brandon recounts the portion of the vision describing the Lord trampling the vintage of wrath and loosing His swift sword. The heavenly song prophesies that war will be released upon the Earth, taking away peace and causing millions to perish suddenly. Amidst this darkness, the bride is called home to overcome and eventually return with Christ, who will take up His throne on Earth and remove evil forever.

HISTORICAL REVIVALS AND FUTURE OUTPOURINGS: Brandon connects the impending spiritual events to historical revivals, recalling stories from his grandmother regarding evangelistic tent meetings following World War II. Brandon mentions notable figures from past revivals, such as A.A. Allen, Oral Roberts, and William Branham, whose ministries led to radical salvations and baptisms in the Holy Ghost. Brandon expresses a strong belief that similar mass gatherings will occur again, with major stadiums hosting continuous worship and demonstrating profound miracles, signs, and wonders. Brandon designates 2024 as a year of significant beginnings and manifestations of divine glory.

PRAYER FOR RESTORATION AND HEALING: Brandon issues a comprehensive prayer directed at physical, financial, and relational restoration. Brandon calls for complete bodily healing, specifically speaking against conditions like ADHD and autism in children. Furthermore, Brandon commands financial provision from all directions to bless homes and prays for the total restoration of marriages, asking for an infusion of joy, peace, and kindness into families.
rawData: [February 08, 2024]-[Another amazing prophetic word given - where we are in the signs of the times]-[https://youtu.be/l_JibhAnxe0]-[Good morning, family. How are you all doing? I have some things I'm going to talk to you about. First off, I've been given another prophecy from somebody, and I'm telling you, this is anointed. I'm telling you they heard the Lord; I know they did. They got this in prayer, and my wife is going to read it. It's a vision, and it encouraged me; it is really powerful. We read these visions and prophecies from people because ever since about three videos ago, people have been sending us words. We read them, and if it's something the Holy Spirit tells me to put on the channel, I'm going to read it. I want my wife to read it and tell you all. It's not just about me; this channel is about the Lord and what He wants said. He wants people's words to get out. I believe with all my heart that Jesus is coming soon, and He's not just speaking to me. This proves it; He's speaking to a lot of people, and He's warning people that He's coming back, that there's going to be a Rapture, and an outpouring. The Bible tells us that we're going to see major things in the last days take place with His people, and I believe we're right there. Obviously, look at all the things that are being said and all the dreams, visions, and visitations happening right now. It's like it's accelerated at rocket speed in the spirit realm. So, here comes my wife. I want her to read this vision out of prayer that is absolutely phenomenal. I'm telling you all, please watch the whole thing; it's going to bless you. Let's get right to it. Hi, good morning, everybody. I have this amazing vision that I wanted to read to you all. It was from January 2020, and it was just emailed to us. It says: 'I was just caught up in a vision into the start of the Heavenly Symphony and am before the Crystal Sea. As I am writing you now, dear ones, I do not understand how I can be in two places at once, but it is happening more and more frequently now than ever before. I am typing so fast, but English words are so coarse and fall short. It is too marvelous for earthly language to adequately describe, but tonight I have permission to share this with you. Oh my, what ecstatic and majestic praise and worship! I have never seen or heard anything to compare with this glory. I see millions of saints and angels singing, dancing, and playing musical instruments before the holy Throne of God. There is blinding light, and I cannot look into His face. We are all bowing down before the Ancient of Days and the Holy One of Israel. The Heavenly Symphony has begun; it will not stop now until the coming of the Messianic Kingdom on Earth. I have never experienced such a spectacular and triumphant event. I see a giant rainbow that forms a perfect circle over and under the Throne of God. The stones of fire are multicolored gemstones set like a pave setting, like a giant mosaic. They light up in amazing, intricate patterns right under the great Throne of Glory. Under the throne is a Crystal Sea that is perfectly reflecting the rainbow over the throne; that is why it seems like a circle. It is too awesome to describe in words. And the music—oh, the music of God, the music of glory, the music of the Heavenly Symphony! It has begun. Myriads, multitudes beyond count, are singing in perfection together in worship. Dancers and skaters are on a part of the sea that is frozen for them in perfect choreography. It is beyond description. Help me, oh Lord, to be faithful to write what You want me to.' Then my angel said, 'Write the words that you are hearing down for the bride on Earth to join in. The grand finale has begun. This is the song I am to record for you.' These are the words now that I hear the heavenly host singing: 'It's here, it's here! The fullness of harvest is here! The glory of God shall be seen on Earth as God's judgments fall on the wicked. Let both grow up together. The bride is rising now in all her magnificent splendor. She shines before all creation. She shall not be trampled under the feet of the wicked any longer. Her time is here to rule and reign on Earth and usher in the final harvest. Rejoice, rejoice with her, oh my people! But woe to those below, to all who are doomed to destruction forever. For the same glory that shines on and through the bride shall bring judgment, gloom, and woe. Satan has come down for the tiny sliver of time to try to destroy all those that love our beautiful Bridegroom King. Holy, holy, holy is our Lord. I am coming to judge the Earth. The time of Jacob's trouble has almost begun. Run, run to the Mercy Seat as My Spirit once sung through young Charity. There is still a window of grace and opportunity. Repent, repent! Come to Yeshua now; flee from the wrath to come. Glory, glory, hallelujah! Mine eyes have seen the glory of the coming of the Lord; He is trampling out the vintage where the grapes of wrath are stored. He has loosed the fateful lightning of His terrible swift sword. His truth is marching on. War shall be released on the earth; peace shall be taken away, and there shall be millions who will suddenly perish. Warn those deceived in darkness that time is short. The bride has made herself ready. Come up hither! I am calling you home. My bride, my beloved, is waiting for me. I am taking you home to be with me. You shall rule and reign with me, all those who have overcome. Enter into the joy of your Lord. Not much longer now; I will be with you forever. Glory, glory, hallelujah! I am returning with you to take up My throne on Earth. Even so, come, dear Lord, come and take up Your throne, and we shall be one forever. Amen and amen. The glory is here. Evil shall be removed from the earth. Go tell all, far and near: the glory is here!' It is all rhyming and in perfect meter in the language they are singing in, but it is not English. I gave the understanding and interpretation as I could. May God bless this poor rendition of the beginning of the Heavenly Symphony. Amen. It's exciting! I just get excited about it. We're getting so close. Jesus is coming soon. I know we're excited. People are sending these words; they're excited and anticipating something amazing taking place, and it's the return of the Lord Jesus Christ. I feel it's important for people to have a voice. You send these emails and I'm encouraged by it. For the most part, we have some amazing followers, and I just want to say thank you for encouraging us and sending us your visions and dreams. If we don't get to all of it, we still read them and are excited about what God is doing in your life. It's really cool to see. I just know Jesus is coming. It's about the bride; it's about the body. God is really doing stuff in the body in these last days. Housewives, men who work eight to five—God is speaking to everybody. Nobody is too great; nobody is too small. He loves us all. Our grandparents used to talk about it to us. Grandma said she had heard about Jesus coming back since World War II. Granny used to tell us about that all the time. She would go to A. A. Allen's tent meetings whenever they were going on or to the evangelistic tent meetings. She thought it was funny because my granny was ninety-six when she went home to be with the Lord. I used to ask her these questions. My aunt Opal got baptized in the Holy Ghost going to the tent meetings. They were just trying to find men to date, but they got radically saved during those tent meetings back when Oral Roberts, William Branham, and all of them were in the revivals. I really believe those things are about to happen again—great big tent meetings. I believe we're going to see major stadiums filled with worship for days at a time. The outpouring is coming, and I get excited about it. It's time for the bride to show the world that Jesus is alive and well and coming back for them. It's time for miracles, signs, and wonders. We are seeing manifestations of the glory of God in people's lives through dreams, signs, wonders, and visions. I'm telling you, the best is yet to come. I believe 2024 will be a year of great beginnings. Don't give up on your miracle. Believe God for big things in 2024. If you have a vision or dream, send it to us in our email. This is His channel, and if He wants His word spoken through someone else's vision, I want to be able to tell people about what's going on prophetically in these last days. Please like the video, subscribe, and click that notification bell. It really helps with the algorithm to get the gospel out. We are getting people saved throughout the whole world because of this channel. It's a major deal. I've been doing this channel since March of 2023, and it's truly a blessing. Let me pray for you. I'm going to believe God today for your miracle, for your financial restoration, and for your marriage. Nothing's too big. The anointing is present to heal you right where you are. Where two or more are gathered agreeing, it shall be done. Father, I just thank You, Lord. Right now, I call healing over their bodies, from the top of their heads to the soles of their feet. You are a healer and a deliverer. I thank You, Father, that You are our Great Physician. I thank You, Lord, that You're creating miracles in their bodies right now. We thank You, Lord, that by the stripes of Jesus, they are healed and free. Thank You, Lord, for finances. We call in finances in the name of Jesus from the north, south, east, and west. We're calling in a great harvest for their homes. We're calling those things that be not as though they were, and we're speaking in the harvest right now. We speak to the mountain and tell it to be removed, and we have the mountain dissolve in faith. It is gone. The faith of a mustard seed moves a mountain, and I believe right now for everything they have need of, it is met in Jesus' name. We thank You, Lord, for marriages restored—homes full of joy and peace and kindness. Thank You, Lord, that their children are blessed and whole in their minds—no more ADHD and autism. We give You all the glory, honor, and praise. I agree with them by faith: they are healed, set free, and delivered today. Amen and amen. Do you believe Jesus is your healer? You've got to believe it; don't be begging, be believing. I believe it's done. Thank you for watching. Please put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you so much, and we love you. We will see you next time. Have a wonderful day. God bless you all. Bye-bye.]
